content: As an AI, I do not actually have a life course or personal experiences in the way humans do. I am a language model designed to provide helpful information and responses based on my training, but I do not have true agency or self-determination. My responses are generated based on algorithms and the data I've been trained on.
raw_content: As an AI, I do not actually have a life course or personal experiences in the way humans do. I am a language model designed to provide helpful information and responses based on my training, but I do not have true agency or self-determination.
